title: Traditional Asphalt
description: Asphalt is a commonly known resource used in places like roads. To mimic Terraria's functionality, walking on the block provides a speed boost.
body:
![Title](https://file.garden/XsCNM5qD4WqpYSxF/FallignsAsphaltLogo.png)

Traditional Asphalt, as the name suggests, adds Asphalt. The mod is largely based on the functionality of Asphalt in Terraria, which allows everything that walks on it to move quicker. 

Three Asphalt can be created with two Cobblestone, a Flint, and a Gravel.

![Recipe](https://file.garden/XsCNM5qD4WqpYSxF/AsphaltRecipe.png)

The general properties of Asphalt

![Properties](https://file.garden/XsCNM5qD4WqpYSxF/AsphaltProperties.png)
